parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ action: 'create', title: $json.title, description: $json.description, source: 'Proactive Intel Scanner', priority: 'medium', status: 'open' }) }}

parameters.query: ={{ 'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_proactive_scans (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, scan_date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(), prediction_count INTEGER, top_recommendation TEXT, pushed_to_actions BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, raw_predictions JSONB); INSERT INTO gda_proactive_scans (prediction_count, top_recommendation, pushed_to_actions, raw_predictions) VALUES (' + $json.prediction_count + ', ' + "'" + ($json.top_recommendation||'').replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" + ', true, ' + "'" + JSON.stringify($json.predictions||[]).replace(/'/g,"''") + "'::jsonb" + '); SELECT id, scan_date, prediction_count FROM gda_proactive_scans ORDER BY scan_date DESC LIMIT 1;' }}
